\tzpentry{ID5136}{Phase Field Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5136 introduces Phase Field Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(k\\_{\\mathrm{nl}}=\\frac{\\lvert\\nabla^2\\phi\\rvert}{\\lvert\\nabla\\phi\\rvert^2}\\)
\]
